ValidationRule.description: Do not allow case to be assigned to other banks if status is in 'DocParser Processing', 'Manual Processing', 'System Error'
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser,IF( AND( OR(ISPICKVAL(Status , 'DocParser Processing'), ISPICKVAL(Status , 'Manually Process'), ISPICKVAL(Status , 'System Error')), ISCHANGED ( Assign_To__c )), True, False))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Case in this status is not allowed to assign to any bank
